title: paramutheomai #3888
definition:
1) to speak to, address one, whether by way of admonition and
    incentive, or to calm and console
    1a) to encourage, console
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to speak to, address one, whether by way of admonition and
    incentive, or to calm and console
    1a) to encourage, console

    NASB:  to encourge, comfort:
